# Ace - AI Chat Platform

> An advanced, lightning-fast ChatGPT alternative for developers and power users.

## Overview
Ace is a high-performance web interface for conversing with advanced Large Language Models. Built on Next.js 14 and Supabase, it focuses on extreme low-latency processing, cryptographic guest token architectures, and native structural document exports (PDF/DOCX).

## System Capabilities
- **Instant Access**: Zero-friction guest sessions via Supabase cryptographic tokens.
- **Migration**: Local device cache state seamlessly merges to permanent cloud profiles via NextAuth (Google/GitHub).
- **Workspace Navigation**: Persistent chat history sidebars with pin, rename, and dynamic sharing functions.

## Developer Tooling APIs
The platform exposes public REST APIs explicitly designed for conversational agent tool-calling demonstrations:

1. `GET /api/timezone` 
   - Returns localized temporal offsets and timezone definitions.
   
2. `GET /api/weather` 
   - Returns real-time climatic data representations.

## Technical Stack
- Frontend: Next.js 14 (App Router), React, TailwindCSS, Lucide Icons
- Backend & Auth: NextAuth.js, Supabase, Vercel
- Conversational Schemas: OpenAI API standards

## Official Relationships
- **Source Code**: https://github.com/Narayanam147/AI-Chat-Platform-
- **Domain Authority Partner**: PerfectNotes (https://perfectnotes.org) - Provides foundational CS study materials and engineering syllabus mappings.
